diagnoses.name: Cocaine use, unspecified, uncomplicated
diagnoses.evidence_span: The pt reports recent cocaine use

diagnoses.name: Alcohol use disorder with alcohol-induced disorder
diagnoses.evidence_span: continued alcohol consumption, noting that his mood has been significantly depressed and his thinking increasingly disorganized. He admits to active cocaine use, unspecified, uncomplicated, and acknowledges ongoing struggles with alcohol use disorder with an unspecified alcohol-induced disorder

diagnoses.name: Psychoactive substance-induced mood disorder
diagnoses.evidence_span: The combination of his underlying psychiatric condition, active substance use—particularly cocaine—and psychoactive substance-induced mood disorder has created an acute crisis

diagnoses.name: Schizophrenia, unspecified
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient also carries a longstanding diagnosis of schizophrenia, unspecified, which has been difficult to manage pharmacologically during periods of substance use

diagnoses.name: Auditory hallucinations
diagnoses.evidence_span: He reports feeling hopeless, paranoid, and experiencing auditory hallucinations. The pt appeared disheveled, with poor hygiene and limited eye contact. Mental status exam revealed disorganized speech, paranoid ideation, and auditory hallucinations.

diagnoses.name: HIV disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: the pt has a significant past medical history including HIV disease on prior antiretroviral therapy

diagnoses.name: Chronic viral hepatitis C
diagnoses.evidence_span: chronic viral hepatitis C without hepatic coma

diagnoses.name: History of traumatic brain injury
diagnoses.evidence_span: a remote history of traumatic brain injury

diagnoses.name: Paranoid ideation
diagnoses.evidence_span: He reports feeling hopeless, paranoid, and experiencing auditory hallucinations. Mental status exam revealed disorganized speech, paranoid ideation, and auditory hallucinations.

procedures.name: Psychiatric evaluation
procedures.evidence_span: The pt was initiated on a structured psychiatric evaluation and medical assessment to address his multiple comorbidities

procedures.name: Medical assessment
procedures.evidence_span: The pt was initiated on a structured psychiatric evaluation and medical assessment to address his multiple comorbidities

procedures.name: Mental status examination
procedures.evidence_span: Mental status exam revealed disorganized speech, paranoid ideation, and auditory hallucinations

procedures.name: Laboratory testing including CD4 count and hepatic function panel
procedures.evidence_span: Labs on admission showed CD4 count of 285 cells/mm³, indicating need for close HIV monitoring. Hepatic function panel was notable for elevated transaminases consistent with chronic hepatitis C

medications.name: Quetiapine fumarate
medications.evidence_span: He will continue quetiapine fumarate for antipsychotic coverage at doses ranging from 25 mg to 300 mg for titration flexibility

medications.name: Sertraline
medications.evidence_span: sertraline 25 mg daily for mood support

medications.name: Hydroxyzine
medications.evidence_span: hydroxyzine 50 mg as needed for anxiety

medications.name: Thiamine
medications.evidence_span: He is prescribed thiamine 100 mg daily and folic acid 1 mg daily for nutritional supplementation given his substance use history

medications.name: Folic acid
medications.evidence_span: He is prescribed thiamine 100 mg daily and folic acid 1 mg daily for nutritional supplementation given his substance use history

medications.name: Sulfamethoxazole-trimethoprim DS
medications.evidence_span: Sulfamethoxazole-trimethoprim DS is continued for PCP prophylaxis given his CD4 count below 200

medications.name: Multivitamins
medications.evidence_span: Supportive measures including multivitamins, calcium carbonate supplementation, lidocaine 5% patch, and Bengay cream for musculoskeletal discomfort

medications.name: Calcium carbonate
medications.evidence_span: Supportive measures including multivitamins, calcium carbonate supplementation, lidocaine 5% patch, and Bengay cream for musculoskeletal discomfort

medications.name: Lidocaine 5% patch
medications.evidence_span: Supportive measures including multivitamins, calcium carbonate supplementation, lidocaine 5% patch, and Bengay cream for musculoskeletal discomfort

medications.name: Bengay cream
medications.evidence_span: Supportive measures including multivitamins, calcium carbonate supplementation, lidocaine 5% patch, and Bengay cream for musculoskeletal discomfort

chief_complaint: Acute psychiatric decompensation in the setting of polysubstance use
